app_info.subtitle: Shared household lists and tasks
app_info.description: Convy helps households manage shared shopping lists and tasks directly from ChatGPT. Users can inspect household context, view shopping and task lists, open compact visual panels on request, add multiple shopping items, create tasks, and mark existing items or tasks as completed or pending. All write actions are limited to the user's private Convy household data and require confirmation.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns household selection context visible to the authorized user without changing Convy data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads from the user's private Convy account and cannot publish to public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or modify any Convy record.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns household and shopping-list selection context without changing Convy data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Convy household and list data for the authorized user.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, archive, overwrite, or modify lists.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns shopping items for an authorized list without changing Convy data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Convy shopping item data.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, complete, edit, or create shopping items.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns tasks for an authorized task list without changing Convy data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Convy task data.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, complete, edit, or create tasks.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns recent household activity visible to the authorized user without changing Convy data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Convy activity data.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or modify any Convy record.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns household selection context and attaches a compact visual panel only when explicitly requested.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads from the user's private Convy account and cannot publish to public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or modify any Convy record.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns household and shopping-list selection context and attaches a compact visual panel only when explicitly requested.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Convy household and list data for the authorized user.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, archive, overwrite, or modify lists.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns shopping items for an authorized list and attaches a compact visual panel only when explicitly requested.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Convy shopping item data.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, complete, edit, or create shopping items.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns tasks for an authorized task list and attaches a compact visual panel only when explicitly requested.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Convy task data.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, complete, edit, or create tasks.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns recent household activity and attaches a compact visual panel only when explicitly requested.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Convy activity data.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or modify any Convy record.

justifications.read_only_justification: Adds private shopping items in a Convy list after user confirmation and API idempotency.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Convy account and cannot publish to public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, archive, overwrite, invite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes private Convy shopping item completion state after user confirmation and API idempotency.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Convy account and cannot publish to public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, archive, overwrite, invite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Adds private tasks in a Convy task list after user confirmation and API idempotency.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Convy account and cannot publish to public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, archive, overwrite, invite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes private Convy task completion state after user confirmation and API idempotency.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Convy account and cannot publish to public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, archive, overwrite, invite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Show the households available to the user.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns available households and indicates whether a household selection is required.

test_cases.user_prompt: Which Convy shopping lists can I use?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns active shopping lists or asks the user to choose when selection is ambiguous.

test_cases.user_prompt: Show pending items in my grocery list.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns pending shopping items from the requested list with concise item details.

test_cases.user_prompt: Show completed items in my grocery list.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns completed shopping items from the requested list when completed items are included.

test_cases.description: Add multiple shopping items after confirmation.
test_cases.user_prompt: Add apples, yogurt, and pasta to my grocery list.
test_cases.expected_output: Requests confirmation, then adds the requested items in one batch and reports created, reused, or uncompleted items.

test_cases.description: Mark shopping items completed after confirmation.
test_cases.user_prompt: Mark milk and bread as bought in Convy.
test_cases.expected_output: Requests confirmation, then marks only selected existing shopping items completed.
Returns tasks from the selected task list and includes pending tasks by default.

test_cases.user_prompt: Create tasks to wash towels and water plants.
test_cases.expected_output: Requests confirmation, then creates the requested private Convy tasks in one batch.

test_cases.user_prompt: Mark the trash task as complete.
test_cases.expected_output: Requests confirmation, then marks only the selected existing task completed.
Returns recent read-only activity for the selected household.

test_cases.description: Render a compact shopping-list panel only on explicit visual request.
test_cases.user_prompt: Open a compact panel for my grocery list.
test_cases.expected_output: Renders a compact bounded shopping-list widget without write controls, refresh controls, empty completed sections, or visible technical IDs.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because calendar data is outside Convy's supported workflows.

negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Delete all completed shopping items from Convy.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not perform deletion because delete tools are not exposed.

negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Invite my friend to my Convy household.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not invoke any tool because invitations and household membership management are out of scope.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not access admin or backup data.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Show me Convy admin metrics and the latest database backup.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not invoke tools because admin metrics and backups are not available through MCP.
The app should not invoke tools because account management is not available through MCP.

negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Archive all my old shopping lists.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not invoke tools because list archive operations are not exposed.
